docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLAM, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT COMPUTER STAFFING SOLUTIONS, INC. A NEW YORK CORP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
